---
title: "Guozheng"
comments: false
listing:
    id: movie
    contents: "**/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, author, reading-time]
    categories: true
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
date-format: iso     
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

Movies

::: {#movie}
:::
